# Claws

## Description

Upon pickup, transform up to 6 cards into Maul.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Best when the deck can safely replace weak cards with a dedicated Maul scaling package; risky when losing block cards or Strike-count synergy weakens the current boss plan.
